requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防及场址安全资料包
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防及場址安全資料包

summary.en: Jordan BESS fire safety is normally a project and site review rather than a single public product mark. Project owners, civil-defense or local authorities, insurers, EPCs, and lenders may request container layout, separation distances, fire detection and suppression design, ventilation, gas detection where relevant, thermal-runaway mitigation, emergency shutdown, access routes, spill and water-runoff controls, and local-language emergency procedures.
summary.zh: 约旦BESS消防安全通常是项目和场址审查，而不是单一公开产品标志。项目业主、民防或地方主管机关、保险方、EPC和贷款方可能要求集装箱布置、间距、火灾探测和灭火设计、通风、适用时的气体探测、热失控缓解、紧急停机、通道、泄漏和消防水径流控制以及当地语言应急程序。
summary.zht: 約旦BESS消防安全通常是項目和場址審查，而不是單一公開產品標誌。項目業主、民防或地方主管機關、保險方、EPC和貸款方可能要求集裝箱布置、間距、火災探測和滅火設計、通風、適用時的氣體探測、熱失控緩解、緊急停機、通道、洩漏和消防水徑流控制以及當地語言應急程序。

standards_or_laws: Jordan local civil-defense, building, fire, and site-permit review where applicable

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, container fire-suppression design, and project fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents may support technical due diligence but do not replace Jordan site, insurer, civil-defense, or owner acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集装箱灭火设计和项目消防审查管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代约旦场址、保险方、民防或业主接受。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集裝箱滅火設計和項目消防審查管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代約旦場址、保險方、民防或業主接受。

gap.en: Build a site-specific fire-safety dossier rather than relying only on cell or rack certificates. Include thermal-runaway test evidence, enclosure drawings, fire-detection logic, suppression design, HVAC and ventilation basis, emergency shutdown, signage, maintenance procedures, incident-response plan, and Arabic or English operating instructions requested by the Jordan project.
gap.zh: 应建立场址特定消防安全资料包，而不是仅依赖电芯或电池簇证书。资料应包括热失控测试证据、箱体图纸、火灾探测逻辑、灭火设计、暖通和通风依据、紧急停机、标识、维护程序、事故响应计划，以及约旦项目要求的阿拉伯语或英语操作说明。
gap.zht: 應建立場址特定消防安全資料包，而不是僅依賴電芯或電池簇證書。資料應包括熱失控測試證據、箱體圖紙、火災探測邏輯、滅火設計、暖通和通風依據、緊急停機、標識、維護程序、事故響應計劃，以及約旦項目要求的阿拉伯語或英語操作說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Jordan civil-defense, building, fire, site permit, project owner, insurer, lender, EPC, or utility review requires fire-safety approval or evidence; details are project and site specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, contract, and stationary energy-storage standard scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Battery safety evidence alone does not close the Jordan BESS fire-safety gap. Site fire design and local acceptance should be handled before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电池安全证据本身不足以覆盖约旦BESS消防安全差距。出货或调试前应处理场址消防设计和当地接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電池安全證據本身不足以覆蓋約旦BESS消防安全差距。出貨或調試前應處理場址消防設計和當地接受。
